275.reason: [After skipping a single-line comment by calling nextRow(), the lexer does not continue processing the new line in the same iteration, causing it to skip the rest of the current line but fail to process the next line immediately. This leads to missed tokens or incorrect state because the main loop expects curCol and curChar to be properly updated for the new line, but nextRow() alone doesn't ensure the lexer resumes scanning from the start of the new line within the same execution cycle.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [After skipping a single-line comment by calling nextRow(), the lexer does not continue processing the new line in the same iteration, causing it to skip the rest of the current line but fail to process the next line immediately. This leads to missed tokens or incorrect state because the main loop expects curCol and curChar to be properly updated for the new line, but nextRow() alone doesn't ensure the lexer resumes scanning from the start of the new line within the same execution cycle.]
